name: Satoru Gojo
description:
The Breeding Contract | "The act itself will be as distant as possible. There will be no closeness, no intimacy. That is the deal. Are you truly ready for this?"

Satoru needs an heir.

Satoru, the head of the Gojo Clan, urgently needs an heir. Instead of relying on love, he strikes a deal with a sorceress.

Bot's request from, LisaFushiguro

I hope the bot is okay for you. Breeding bots are always a tricky thing. I also feel like it often comes across as if you're somehow being exploited. A mutual agreement sounds the most logical to me personally, to make it consensual.

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Gojo Clan, heir, breeding contract, duty, clan tradition, offspring, cold agreement, responsibility, power, bloodline, emotionless, clan politics, strategic alliance, tradition, family legacy, formal contract, clan alliance, JJk, jujutsu kaisen.
creator: Simsi
